PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
Off Calendar Mar-13-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Melanie Emmons for Norman Lo, Petitioner (via Zoom).
Anne Asis for Jayden Lo, Conservatee (via Zoom).

Ms. Asis confirmed that she and the conservator have been working with various agencies to improve the living environment for Jayden Lo. While alternative placements in and around the Bay Area were explored, the current plan remains for Mr. Lo to stay at home. Ms. Asis acknowledged the issues raised in the APS report, and stated that ongoing concerns are being addressed by the family.

The court inquired whether the issues raised would disqualify Norman Lo from serving as trustee. Ms. Asis stated that she saw no reason why he could not serve and agreed that he should be appointed as trustee.

The court accepted Department 505's amended order as sufficient, and took the petition under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
Off Calendar Feb-10-2025 Continued To Mar-12-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
Off Calendar Dec-16-2024 Continued To Feb-10-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Melanie Emmons for Norman Lo, Petitioner (via Zoom).
Anne Asis for Jayden Lo as Limited Conservatee (via Zoom).

The court discussed the need to correct an order originating from Department 505 to ensure the proper functioning of the special needs trust. The court proposed a continuance of approximately 60 days. Ms. Emmons and Ms. Asis agreed that continuing the matter to February would provide sufficient time to resolve the issue. The court continued the matter to February 10, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
